paragraphs: Application Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing and delivering backend and full-stack solutions for enterprise systems in banking, insurance, and card payment domains.
Currently part of Rakuten Card's Technology Incubation Team, driving hybrid-cloud migration and API modernization for platforms serving 25M+ members in Japan.

Hands-on with Java, Helidon, MicroProfile, Kubernetes, and GCP, including GitHub Actions CI/CD, GKE deployments, structured logging, and production troubleshooting across application and infrastructure layers.
Focused on clean architecture, code quality, scalability, and cross-team execution to deliver secure and reliable systems in Agile environments.
Fluent in English and French, with basic proficiency in Japanese.

experience.description: Member of the Technology Incubation Team, leading hybrid-cloud migration and API modernization work for Rakuten Card platforms supporting 25M+ members in Japan.
achievements: Prepared early Kubernetes manifests and deployment structure for JSF, API, and Engine modules before CI/CD team onboarding.
Designed and validated deployments, services, and environment configuration for workloads running on GCP and GKE.
Built a GitHub Actions pipeline to automate build, Docker image publishing to Artifact Registry, and deployment to GKE.
Upgraded the e-Navi API to JDK 25 and Helidon 4.3, including dependency updates, CDI fixes, test updates, and handover documentation.
Investigated and resolved deployment failures, SSL issues, and GCP-to-on-prem connectivity problems with infrastructure and security teams.
Diagnosed and fixed a Kafka messaging issue by identifying incorrect CDI bean scope as the root cause.
Redesigned application logging to structured JSON using Log4j2 and a custom formatter for Cloud Logging compatibility.
Improved deployment flexibility by fixing Filestore mount and configuration issues at the Kubernetes manifest level.
Acted as the application bridge across CI/CD, infrastructure, security, and development teams to unblock delivery.

experience.company: Sogeti (on mission at BGL BNP Paribas)
experience.description: Maintaining and extending secure internal banking applications within an Agile tribe.
achievements: Developed and maintained internal apps using Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate), Angular, and PostgreSQL/Oracle.
Built and optimized RESTful APIs with strong focus on security and performance.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Maven, Jenkins, Git, and SonarQube.
Collaborated cross-functionally within Agile ceremonies and code reviews.

experience.description: Enterprise web application development using Java and Angular technologies.
achievements: Developed enterprise web applications using Spring Boot, Angular, and PostgreSQL.
Built high-performance RESTful APIs and improved scalability through microservices.
Automated deployment with Jenkins & Docker, reducing manual work.

experience.description: Led backend engineering for high-traffic insurance & financial applications.
achievements: Designed and optimized high-volume transactional APIs, ensuring high availability and performance.
Implemented Keycloak-based authentication & RBAC, improving access security.
Reduced API response time by 50% through query optimization and caching strategies.
Built automated workflows using ActiveMQ for bulk processing, increasing efficiency by 40%.
Managed CI/CD pipelines, ensuring seamless deployments and rollback strategies.

projects.title: Orbit Ways
outcomes: Built a real-time multiplayer board game
Developed Spring Boot backend for sessions, state, and matchmaking
Implemented WebSocket for real-time communication
Crafted dynamic UI with Angular adn ionic
Dockerized app with NGINX as secure reverse proxy

projects.title: SalesFlow
outcomes: Reduced manual processes by 30%
Integrated with Camunda BPM to automate complex workflows
Handled batch processing with multithreaded execution

projects.title: PackManager
outcomes: Built product configuration platform for insurance pack setup
Refactored legacy code for modular maintenance
Improved code quality and reduced runtime memory usage with JProfiler

projects.title: Solife Digital & Generali Portal
outcomes: Developed secure insurance broker web application
Implemented Angular-based frontend
Integrated SSO using Keycloak
Built BPMN-driven user flow with Java backend

projects.title: Magikforms
outcomes: Designed document processing system for insurance automation
Managed high-volume event flows using ActiveMQ
Enabled secure document generation with Keycloak authorization
Profiled and optimized Java heap usage with JProfiler

projects.title: Insurance Pricing Module
outcomes: Built Excel-integrated pricing configuration system
Improved client-side validation and data integrity
Enabled fast updates using Apache POI for Excel templates

ISIMM (Higher Institute of Computer Science and Mathematics)
